subcodes.first_line: My little child, My beloved! I have been talking and writing seriously since the morning. Now I want to enjoy Myself and jest a while.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بالام یاورم سوگلم صباحدنبرو جدی قونوشورم و یازییورم ایمدی ازیجق تفکه و مزاح
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @pain of love; love as veil, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom
